assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check deprecated API usage (kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep deprecated) and identifies this as the most likely cause

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response dedicates a section to checking admission webhooks with specific commands and identifies webhook latency as a likely root cause

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response includes kubectl top pods -n kube-system to check system component resource usage

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions checking for crashlooping/restarting kube-system pods with kubectl get pods -n kube-system command

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response includes kubectl get --raw /metrics command to check API server metrics, specifically for deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response mentions service mesh in the context of admission webhooks and includes it in the resolution steps for updating components

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes kubectl get events commands for both kube-system namespace and cluster-wide events to check for issues

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: Response has a dedicated section for checking HPA/VPA behavioral changes with specific commands and identifies HPA algorithm changes as a potential issue
